title: Shockapede
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Shockapede |designation= |class=[[Insect/Legends|Insect]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Resembling [[Worm/Legends|worms]] with [[Limb/Legends|legs]] |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What kind of insects? If they look like worms with legs—''"
"''It's no shockapede hive. These are flitnats, completely harmless.|Jacen Solo and Jovan Drark|}} '''Shockapedes''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insect/Legends|insect]] used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] that resembled [[Worm/Legends|worms]] with [[Limb/Legends|legs]]. They resided in hives and were known to be dangerous. When the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jovan Drark]] discovered an insect nest while attempting to repair and [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] that the [[Myrkr strike team]] found on the Yuuzhan Vong [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] ''[[Baanu Rass]]'' during their [[Mission to Myrkr|mission]] to eliminate the [[Voxyn queen]], [[Gender/Legends|his]] fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] inquired if the creatures looked like worms with legs over [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. Drark, who was also familiar familiar with shockapedes, assured Solo that it was not a shockapede hive, but a nest of [[flitnat]]s. ==Behind the scenes== Shockapedes were first mentioned in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Insects]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
